languages.text: Отвратительный мутант, в котором осталось мало человеческого. Сосуды с пузырящейся жидкостью срощены с телом и соединены трубками с местом, где когда-то была его голова.
A revolting mutant with little humanity left within it. Vessels of bubbling fluid are fused to its body and connected by tubes to where its head once was.
languages.original_text: Отвратительный мутант, в котором осталось мало человеческого. Сосуды с пузырящейся жидкостью срощены с телом и соединены трубками с местом, где когда-то была его голова.

traits.locale_text: A revolting mutant with little humanity left within it. Vessels of bubbling fluid are fused to its body and connected by tubes to where its head once was.

A revolting mutant with little humanity left within it. Vessels of bubbling fluid are fused to its body and connected by tubes to where its head once was.

languages.text: Un mutante repulsivo al que le queda poco de ser humano. Tiene receptáculos llenos de un fluido burbujeante fundidos con su cuerpo y conectados por tubos al lugar que ocupaba su cabeza.
languages.original_text: A revolting mutant with little humanity left within it. Vessels of bubbling fluid are fused to its body and connected by tubes to where its head once was.

traits.locale_text: Un mutante repulsivo al que le queda poco de ser humano. Tiene receptáculos llenos de un fluido burbujeante fundidos con su cuerpo y conectados por tubos al lugar que ocupaba su cabeza.

languages.text: Un mutant répugnant qui n'a plus grand-chose d'humain. Des récipients remplis d'un liquide bouillonnant sont soudés à son corps et reliés par des tubes à l'endroit où se trouvait sa tête auparavant.
languages.original_text: A revolting mutant with little humanity left within it. Vessels of bubbling fluid are fused to its body and connected by tubes to where its head once was.

traits.locale_text: Un mutant répugnant qui n'a plus grand-chose d'humain. Des récipients remplis d'un liquide bouillonnant sont soudés à son corps et reliés par des tubes à l'endroit où se trouvait sa tête auparavant.

languages.text: 令人作呕、鲜有人性的变种人。装满沸腾液体的容器嵌入了它的躯体，管线直连其头颅原先所在之处。
languages.original_text: A revolting mutant with little humanity left within it. Vessels of bubbling fluid are fused to its body and connected by tubes to where its head once was.

traits.locale_text: 令人作呕、鲜有人性的变种人。装满沸腾液体的容器嵌入了它的躯体，管线直连其头颅原先所在之处。

languages.text: Ein abstoßender Mutant mit einem letzten Rest Menschlichkeit. An seinem Körper befinden sich Gefäße mit brodelnden Flüssigkeiten, die über Röhren mit seinem nun fehlenden Kopf verbunden waren.
languages.original_text: A revolting mutant with little humanity left within it. Vessels of bubbling fluid are fused to its body and connected by tubes to where its head once was.

traits.locale_text: Ein abstoßender Mutant mit einem letzten Rest Menschlichkeit. An seinem Körper befinden sich Gefäße mit brodelnden Flüssigkeiten, die über Röhren mit seinem nun fehlenden Kopf verbunden waren.

languages.text: İçinde insanlıktan pek eser kalmamış iğrenç bir mutant. Fokurdayan sıvıyla dolu kaplar, vücuduna kaynaşmış ve tüplerle eskiden başının olduğu yere bağlanmış.
languages.original_text: A revolting mutant with little humanity left within it. Vessels of bubbling fluid are fused to its body and connected by tubes to where its head once was.

traits.locale_text: İçinde insanlıktan pek eser kalmamış iğrenç bir mutant. Fokurdayan sıvıyla dolu kaplar, vücuduna kaynaşmış ve tüplerle eskiden başının olduğu yere bağlanmış.

languages.text: 内にはもはや人間性をほとんど残していない、おぞましい突然変異体。泡立つ液体の入った容器がその体に融合し、かつて頭部があった場所へと管でつながれている。
languages.original_text: A revolting mutant with little humanity left within it. Vessels of bubbling fluid are fused to its body and connected by tubes to where its head once was.

traits.locale_text: 内にはもはや人間性をほとんど残していない、おぞましい突然変異体。泡立つ液体の入った容器がその体に融合し、かつて頭部があった場所へと管でつながれている。
